voting.abstention_policy: no vote before deadline counts as abstain
voting.disconnected_players: cannot vote while disconnected and are shown as unavailable

player_count_behavior.4: single shared input window followed by three-voter spotlights
player_count_behavior.5: single shared input window followed by four-voter spotlights
player_count_behavior.6: single shared input window followed by five-voter spotlights
player_count_behavior.7: single shared input window followed by six-voter spotlights
player_count_behavior.8: single shared input window followed by seven-voter spotlights

failure_policy.afk_input: auto-submit the true statement as truth

playtest_calibration.rationale: 240 seconds covers one 45-second input window plus sequential spotlights, reveals, and scoreboard overhead at the 4 to 8 player range.
playtest_calibration.follow_up: Recalibrate after playtest timing data confirms real spotlight pacing.

authored_content.package_summary: A Nightcap social opener where each player fills a blank in a true character fact, then chooses whether to present it honestly or as a lie for the table to judge.

surface_contract.phone: private fact prompt with one blank, text entry, submit-action buttons, vote buttons when eligible, and personal result feedback
surface_contract.shared_display: narrator-led framing, timer, current spotlight, vote breakdown, degenerate-case commentary, and final leaderboard
surface_contract.host: progress visibility, fallback visibility, and moderator-safe status without private fact leakage

deflection_tendency.note: The canonical spec and runtime signal name remains deflection_tendency. The authored declaration key uses a hyphen only because the AW-249 slug validator rejects underscores.

fallback_contract.behavior: If the social opener times out or aborts, the host advances immediately without awarding or withholding a clue. The game resolves as flavor only and the arc continues with no clue gate applied.
fallback_contract.shared_display_line: We'll call that calibration complete enough for one evening. No revelation lost, no trail delayed. Back to the case.
fallback_contract.host_line: Advance the session immediately. Tell Me Something True does not hold or unlock a clue on fallback.
fallback_contract.player_device_line: Time. The room moves on, and so does the case.

high-society.title: The Host's Parlor Game
high-society.narrator_intro: Welcome, darlings. A proper gathering deserves at least one dangerous little honesty exercise. Fill the missing detail, decide how brave you feel, and let the room pretend it can still recognize sincerity when it hears it.
high-society.narrator_reveal: The cards are on the velvet now. Some of you offered confession, some performance, and the room applauded both with equal bad judgment.
high-society.degenerate_truth_line: A breathtaking outbreak of sincerity. Either the room has found its conscience, or none of you had the nerve to be interesting.
high-society.degenerate_lie_line: Marvelous. Every soul at the table chose deceit on purpose. We can stop pretending this evening was ever going to remain respectable.

corporate.title: Mandatory Synergy
corporate.narrator_intro: Welcome to Mandatory Synergy, where trust is a deliverable and embarrassment is a team exercise. Complete the sentence, tag it truth or lie, and let's see which of your colleagues mistakes confidence for integrity.
corporate.narrator_reveal: Outstanding collaboration. By which I mean several of you weaponized vulnerability and the rest signed off on it with alarming enthusiasm.
corporate.degenerate_truth_line: Incredible. A full-table commitment to honesty. HR will call this growth. Everyone else will call it suspicious.
corporate.degenerate_lie_line: Excellent alignment. Every participant selected deception as the shared strategy, which is frankly the most realistic corporate outcome available.

sci-fi.title: Biometric Calibration
sci-fi.narrator_intro: Biometric Calibration is now in progress. Supply the missing data point, classify your statement as true or fabricated, and allow the chamber to observe how quickly social certainty collapses under light pressure.
sci-fi.narrator_reveal: Calibration complete. Truth signatures were noisy, fabricated signatures were elegant, and the room once again overestimated its ability to detect either.
sci-fi.degenerate_truth_line: Unexpected result. Universal truth reporting detected. Either the chamber inspired honesty, or your species has become dramatically less fun.
sci-fi.degenerate_lie_line: Expectedly grim result. Universal fabrication detected. The chamber appreciates your efficiency, if not your character.

surface_rules.shared_display: never reveal private fact prompts or unrevealed typed inputs
surface_rules.phone: may show only the local player's prompt during input and voting controls when eligible
surface_rules.host: may show progress and fallback state without exposing private fact text

runtime_boundaries: Python owns vote acceptance and reveal timing
safety: facts must come from character profile data only
no private fact leakage to shared display before reveal

behavioral_outputs.description: Non-derived sentinel confirming the participant completed or received an authoritative input resolution for the round.
Percentage of a participant's truth submissions that the table correctly identified as truth.
Percentage of non-abstaining votes on a participant's lie submission that were fooled into voting Truth.
Rate at which a participant's votes matched the spotlighted statement's true or lie result across the round.
Scalar sentinel declaration for the canonical deflection_tendency signal. The authored key stays hyphenated only to satisfy current AW-249 slug validation.
Whether every submitted statement in the run was marked Truth.
Non-derived sentinel confirming the round reached deterministic resolution in runtime.
Whether every submitted statement in the run was marked Lie.
